execution_ownership.valid_unchanged_reuse_basis: <same request, same model files, same inputs, same invariants, same expected answer, and prior FlowGuard operator-owned run still current|none>

missing_evidence: <evidence needed before a reliable answer exists>

covered: <state, function, behavior, path, object, or product area covered>

missing_test_kinds: <required model-obligation test kind still missing, or empty array>
conformance_boundary: <whether this is abstract model evidence only, ordinary test evidence, conformance replay, or a bounded combination>
residual_blindspots: <known model, test, replay, data, tooling, or human-review blindspot>

background_artifact_completion.command: <long test command cited by this report>

hard_blockers: <invariant violation, unrecoverable state, duplicate side effect, unsafe publish/delete path, or other must-fix-before-advance issue>
pm_review_required: <model-derived hotspot, ambiguity, missing evidence, external dependency, or human walkthrough target requiring PM decision>
terminal_replay_or_later_gate: <risk that is not current-gate blocking only because it is explicitly mapped to a named later gate or terminal replay scenario>
non_risk_scope_notes: <scope boundary or known non-risk limitation that should not be reported as unresolved risk>

model_derived_review_agenda: <state, transition, invariant, counterexample, loop, abstraction gap, or conformance target the PM should consider for manual review or route work>
toolchain_or_model_improvement_suggestio: <FlowGuard model abstraction, helper, replay adapter, evidence source, or toolchain improvement suggested by the model review>
human_walkthrough_recommendations: <specific flow, command, UI path, artifact, or process path that should be walked manually or replayed against real evidence>

pm_decision_options.reason: <why this option fits the report evidence>

pm_decision_packet.confidence_boundary: <what the model result proves, what it does not prove, and which assumptions PM must treat as residual context>
